sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root שָׁלַח), always in constr. state. מִשְׁלַה.

(1) a sending; hence a place to which anything is sent. Isa 7:25, מִשְׁלַה שֹׁור “a place to which oxen are driven.”

(2) with the word יָד or יָדַיִם a thing upon which the hand is sent, business, affair, Deu 15:10 23:21 28:8 , 20 Deu 28:20 12:7 , 18 Deu 12:18.
